title: selaginella mucugensis
intro: Selaginella mucugensis is a species of spore-producing, vascular plant commonly known as a resurrection fern, belonging to the Selaginellaceae family. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities, which contribute to its potential health benefits. The health benefits of Selaginella mucugensis include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and exhibiting antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of Selaginella mucugensis can be made into teas, infusions, or capsules, and are often used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
